originator: slide_compose flagged claim_evidence intro-pos1 — three-question goal slide, orchestrator-initiated
image_prompt:
A three-panel scientific illustration framing the three open research questions of the Δfur–ΔlpxC lipid-A-loss rescue in Caulobacter crescentus. Style: clean scientific illustration in the style of a textbook figure or Nature publication graphical abstract — flat colors, thin black outlines, professional academic aesthetic. Use the KBase brand palette: #007DC3 (blue), #5E9732 (green), #F78E1E (orange). White background. Aspect ratio 16:9. Three equal-width panels separated by thin vertical rules.

Panel 1 (left, #007DC3 blue): A schematic Fur repressor protein drawn as a circle labeled 'Fur', shown removed with a dashed outline and a diagonal strikethrough, with a branching fan of short outward arrows radiating from the deletion site. The fan is labeled '93 Fur-released DEGs'. A stylized question mark sits at the outer edge of the fan, with the text label 'Which are required?' beneath it. All arrows in #007DC3 on a white background.

Panel 2 (center, #5E9732 green): A cross-sectional cartoon of the Caulobacter outer membrane. The outer leaflet shows a dashed rectangular space labeled 'ΔlpxC' (indicating lipid A absent) filled by small ceramide phosphoglycerate icon shapes (two-tailed lipid symbols) labeled 'CPG'. A horizontal transport arrow labeled 'Lpt' points from an inner-membrane baseline toward the outer leaflet. A question mark above the outer leaflet is labeled 'CPG + Lpt sufficient?'. Lipid icons and arrows in #5E9732.

Panel 3 (right, #F78E1E orange): Four bacterial cell silhouettes arranged in a 2×2 grid. Top-left: Caulobacter crescentus silhouette labeled 'Caulobacter' with a filled checkmark circle. Top-right, bottom-left, bottom-right: silhouettes of A. baumannii, N. meningitidis, and M. catarrhalis, each labeled by species name and bearing an X circle. A question mark above the 2×2 grid is labeled 'Why only Caulobacter?'. Cell outlines, labels, and icons in #F78E1E.

Text labels in clean sans-serif placed immediately adjacent to their elements: 'Fur', '93 Fur-released DEGs', 'ΔlpxC', 'CPG', 'Lpt', 'Caulobacter', 'A. baumannii', 'N. meningitidis', 'M. catarrhalis', 'Which are required?', 'CPG + Lpt sufficient?', 'Why only Caulobacter?'. Do not include any other text, captions, titles, or annotations.
negative_prompt: no quantitative content, no axes, no data points, no specific numbers, no charts, no graphs, no bar plots, no scatter plots, no human figures, no logos, no copyrighted imagery, no text in non-Latin scripts, no scientific journal watermarks, no additional labels beyond those explicitly named above, no captions, no titles
